Title: Eliminate priority target
Description: The board names a specific rival operative as a priority. The contract is your route to compliance.

Title: Operate under reduced budget
Description: The board freezes discretionary spend. Find a way to deliver without burning capital.

Title: Align with Synthesis Bureau this cycle
Description: The board wants public alignment with a cooperative faction. Take a Synthesis contract this cycle.

Title: No high-exposure operations
Description: The board wants a quiet quarter. Avoid contracts with Exposure > 20.

Title: Demonstrate division capability
Description: Land at least one Success on a board-tagged contract this week.

Title: Demonstrate roster loyalty
Description: No operatives below 40 Loyalty on the active roster by deadline.
